sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47733" key="qalamopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θᾰλᾰμοποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n47733.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">preparing the bed-chamber</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Θαλαμοποιοί</foreign>, name of a play of Aeschylus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:122" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.122</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
